steps.title: Find the vertex input
steps.content:
The parabola opens upward, so its minimum is at the vertex. For 
$$
g(x)=x^2+\frac{27}{2}x
$$,
$$
x=-\frac{b}{2a}=-\frac{\frac{27}{2}}{2}=-\frac{27}{4}
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the function and read the $y$-value of the vertex. The displayed minimum matches the expression found above. The answer is B.
